title: JCraft Additions
description: A library that holds shared assets across JCraft addons.
body:
A library that holds shared assets across JCraft addons.

THIS IS A LIBRARY for shared assets for the JCraft addons that I will create in the future.

Currently this doesn't add a whole lot, however it does add enough to constitute it's own mod; especially for my future plans for addons for JCraft.

This adds a config and nails. 

This mod is a requirement for

https://modrinth.com/mod/tusk-act-4-(jcraft-addon)
